allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add Cloudinary support for permanent audio file storage

MediaService now checks for CLOUDINARY_URL first, falling back to S3,
then mock mode. Cloudinary URLs never expire, solving the audio files
disappearing after Railway redeploys.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add manual ordering for vocabulary topics

Add position field, reorder endpoint, and drag-and-drop support
for vocabulary topics \(same pattern as grammar topics\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add vocabulary topic reordering + sidebar bulk-create link

- Drag-and-drop reorder UI for vocabulary topics
- Added "أسئلة متعددة" to admin sidebar
- Removed exam summary card from LiDen page
- Updated dashboard bulk-create card description

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
